from unittest import TestCase
from ..phone_number_formatter import PhoneNumberFormatter
class TestPhoneNumberFormatter(TestCase):
    def test_format_valid_phone(self):
        self.assertEqual(PhoneNumberFormatter.format('(123) 456-7890'), '(123) 456-7890')
        self.assertEqual(PhoneNumberFormatter.format('123-456-7890'), '(123) 456-7890')
        self.assertEqual(PhoneNumberFormatter.format('1234567890'), '(123) 456-7890')
        self.assertEqual(PhoneNumberFormatter.format('+1 (123) 456-7890'), '(123) 456-7890')

    def test_format_invalid_phone(self):
        self.assertIsNone(PhoneNumberFormatter.format('123-45-6789'))
        self.assertIsNone(PhoneNumberFormatter.format('123456789'))
        self.assertIsNone(PhoneNumberFormatter.format('12345678901'))
        self.assertIsNone(PhoneNumberFormatter.format(''))
        self.assertIsNone(PhoneNumberFormatter.format(None))

    def test_format_non_string_input(self):
        self.assertIsNone(PhoneNumberFormatter.format(1234567890))
